'''Zoma V''' was a jungle [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in the [[Zoma system/Legends|Zoma system]], probably near [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]]. It was inhabited by the primitive [[Felinian]]s, to whom [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] weapons were [[Smuggler/Legends|smuggled]] by [[Sithless Leethe]].
